hero.headline: Building the Future of Student Technology
hero.subtitle: BornoFlow is a complete ecosystem helping Computer Science students learn, build projects, and launch their careers.

story.label: Our Story
story.title: How BornoFlow Began
story.intro: BornoFlow is a modern learning, career, and productivity platform. Bornosoft builds SaaS platforms, AI-powered applications, and educational technologies that empower students worldwide.

idea.title: Idea Started
idea.desc: Identifying the gap between academic CS education and industry-ready skills.

research.title: Research
research.desc: Studying student needs across universities, interviews, and career paths.

development.title: Development
development.desc: Building the first tools — assignment covers, lab reports, and learning modules.

launch.title: Launch
launch.desc: BornoFlow platform launch with core academic productivity tools.

community.title: Growing Community
community.desc: Thousands of students adopting BornoFlow across Bangladesh and beyond.

future.title: Future Vision
future.desc: AI-powered learning, global expansion, and the complete student career ecosystem.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: To empower students and developers with world-class learning resources, AI-powered tools, and modern software solutions that accelerate career growth.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: To become one of the leading technology companies building innovative educational and developer-focused products for the global community.

founders.label: Leadership
founders.title: Meet the Founders
founders.subtitle: Bornosoft is led by passionate engineers building technology that empowers the next generation of software professionals.

nayeem.bio: Mohammad Ali Nayeem is a Software Engineering student and Full Stack Developer with a passion for building scalable web applications, AI-powered platforms, developer tools, and educational technology. He leads the technical architecture and product development of BornoFlow.
nayeem.quote: Technology should solve real problems for students — not add complexity.

reduan.bio: Reduan Ahmad is a Software Engineer passionate about software architecture, modern web technologies, scalable systems, and innovative digital products. As Co-Founder of Bornosoft, he drives product strategy and engineering excellence.
reduan.quote: Great products are built with quality engineering and relentless iteration.

founded.title: Bornosoft Founded
founded.desc: Company established with a vision for student technology.

firstProduct.title: First Product
firstProduct.desc: Assignment Studio and Lab Report Generator launched.

bornoflow.title: BornoFlow
bornoflow.desc: Unified platform bringing all tools under one ecosystem.

ai.title: AI Platform
ai.desc: Borno AI learning assistant in development.

future.title: Future
future.desc: Global expansion and next-generation student tools.

descriptions.innovation: Pushing boundaries with modern technology and creative solutions.
descriptions.quality: Engineering excellence in every feature we ship.
descriptions.community: Built with and for the student developer community.
descriptions.learning: Continuous growth for our users and our team.
descriptions.trust: Reliable, secure, and student-first in everything we do.
descriptions.engineering: Clean code, scalable architecture, and best practices.
descriptions.accessibility: Education tools available to everyone, everywhere.

ecosystem.label: Products
ecosystem.title: Product Ecosystem
ecosystem.subtitle: Bornosoft builds an integrated suite of tools — from learning to career launch.

bornosoft.name: Bornosoft
bornosoft.desc: Parent company building SaaS, AI, and educational technology.

bornoflow.name: BornoFlow
bornoflow.desc: Complete learning, career, and productivity platform for CS students.

bornoMaps.desc: Interactive career roadmaps with 75+ learning paths.

bornoAi.name: Borno AI
bornoAi.desc: AI-powered learning assistant and study tools.

bornoCareer.name: BornoCareer
bornoCareer.desc: Resume builder, ATS checker, and career hub.

bornoUni.name: BornoUni
bornoUni.desc: University explorer with rankings and admission tools.

resumeBuilder.name: Resume Builder
resumeBuilder.desc: ATS-friendly resume builder with PDF export.

assignmentStudio.name: Assignment Studio
assignmentStudio.desc: Professional assignment covers and academic documents.

interviewHub.name: Interview Hub
interviewHub.desc: 5000+ interview questions from Bangladesh tech companies.

developerTools.name: Developer Tools
developerTools.desc: JSON, YAML, encoders, generators, and more.

community.openSource: BornoFlow is open source. Contribute, star, and shape the future.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Questions, feedback, or partnership — we'd love to hear from you.
contact.message: We typically respond within 24–48 hours. For partnerships and university collaborations, reach out via email.
